sections.paragraph: pr. extension, space of time; it becomes an interrogative adv. of time, when? (Arab. متى, Syr. ܙܶܡܬܰܝ, Chald. אֵימָתַי). Gen 30:30 Psa 42:3 94:7 119:82 . Without an interrogation (Syriac ܙܶܡܬܰܝ ܕ), Pro 23:35, מָתי אָקִיץ “when I awake.” Psa 101:2.-לְמָתַי Exo 8:5, and עַד מָתַי how long? 1Sa 16:4. אַחֲרֵי מָתי after how long a time? Jer 13:27.
